message:
fix(mvcc,btree,parser): harden slot cleanup on reclaim, improve cursor boundaries, and fix unqualified column resolution

- Zero all atomic fields when reclaiming orphaned MVCC txn slots to prevent
  stale data from leaking into newly acquired slots (bd-2xns field_order_state)
- Improve btree cursor boundary handling for edge cases
- Fix semantic column resolution to separate known-column matches from
  unknown-column (wildcard) matches, preventing false ambiguity when a
  column is definitively found in one source but speculatively available
  in another
- Update commit marker, replication sender, and snapshot shipping with
  incremental reliability improvements

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
